verses.latin_vulgate: Sic ergo orante Esdra, et implorante eo et flente, et jacente ante templum Dei, collectus est ad eum de Israël cœtus grandis nimis virorum et mulierum et puerorum, et flevit populus fletu multo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְהִתְפַּלֵּ֤ל עֶזְרָא֙ וּכְהִתְוַדֹּת֔וֹ בֹּכֶה֙ וּמִתְנַפֵּ֔ל לִפְנֵ֖י בֵּ֣ית הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים נִקְבְּצוּ֩ אֵלָ֨יו מִיִּשְׂרָאֵ֜ל קָהָ֣ל רַב־מְאֹ֗ד אֲנָשִׁ֤ים וְנָשִׁים֙ וִֽילָדִ֔ים כִּֽי־בָכ֥וּ הָעָ֖ם הַרְבֵּה־בֶֽכֶה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Now when Esdras was thus praying, and beseeching, and weeping, and lying before the temple of God, there was gathered to him of Israel an exceeding great assembly of men and women and children, and the people wept with much lamentation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Esra näin rukoili ja tunnusti, itki ja makasi Jumalan huoneen edessä, kokoontui suuri joukko Israelista hänen tykönsä, miehistä, vaimoista ja lapsista, ja kansa itki sangen kovin.
verses.king_james: Now when Ezra had prayed, and when he had confessed, weeping and casting himself down before the house of God, there assembled unto him out of Israel a very great congregation of men and women and children: for the people wept very sore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et respondit Sechenias filius Jehiel de filiis Ælam, et dixit Esdræ : Nos prævaricati sumus in Deum nostrum, et duximus uxores alienigenas de populis terræ : et nunc, si est pœnitentia in Israël super hoc,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֩עַן֩ שְׁכַנְיָ֨ה בֶן־יְחִיאֵ֜ל מִבְּנֵ֤י (עולם) [עֵילָם֙] וַיֹּ֣אמֶר לְעֶזְרָ֔א אֲנַ֙חְנוּ֙ מָעַ֣לְנוּ בֵאלֹהֵ֔ינוּ וַנֹּ֛שֶׁב נָשִׁ֥ים נׇכְרִיּ֖וֹת מֵעַמֵּ֣י הָאָ֑רֶץ וְעַתָּ֛ה יֵשׁ־מִקְוֶ֥ה לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל עַל־זֹֽאת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Sechenias the son of Jehiel of the sons of Elam answered, and said to Esdras: We have sinned against our God, and have taken strange wives of the people of the land: and now if there be repentance in Israel concerning this,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Sekania Jehielin poika, Elamin lapsista, vastasi Esraa ja sanoi: me olemme rikkoneet Jumalaamme vastaan, että me olemme ottaneet muukalaiset vaimot maan kansoista; mutta vielä on toivo sen vuoksi Israelissa.
verses.king_james: And Shechaniah the son of Jehiel, one of the sons of Elam, answered and said unto Ezra, We have trespassed against our God, and have taken strange wives of the people of the land: yet now there is hope in Israel concerning this thing.

verses.latin_vulgate: percutiamus fœdus cum Domino Deo nostro, ut projiciamus universas uxores, et eos qui de his nati sunt, juxta voluntatem Domini, et eorum qui timent præceptum Domini Dei nostri : secundum legem fiat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֣ה נִֽכְרׇת־בְּרִ֣ית לֵ֠אלֹהֵ֠ינוּ לְהוֹצִ֨יא כׇל־נָשִׁ֜ים וְהַנּוֹלָ֤ד מֵהֶם֙ בַּעֲצַ֣ת אֲדֹנָ֔י וְהַחֲרֵדִ֖ים בְּמִצְוַ֣ת אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ וְכַתּוֹרָ֖ה יֵעָשֶֽׂה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Let us make a covenant with the Lord our God, to put away all the wives, and such as are born of them, according to the will of the Lord, and of them that fear the commandment of the Lord our God: let it be done according to the law.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tehkäämme nyt liitto meidän Jumalamme kanssa ajaaksemme kaikki vaimot pois ja ne, jotka heistä syntyneet ovat, Herran neuvon jälkeen ja niiden, jotka pelkäävät meidän Jumalamme käskyä; ja tapahtukoon lain jälkeen.
verses.king_james: Now therefore let us make a covenant with our God to put away all the wives, and such as are born of them, according to the counsel of my lord, and of those that tremble at the commandment of our God; and let it be done according to the law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surge, tuum est decernere, nosque erimus tecum : confortare, et fac.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֛וּם כִּֽי־עָלֶ֥יךָ הַדָּבָ֖ר וַאֲנַ֣חְנוּ עִמָּ֑ךְ חֲזַ֖ק וַעֲשֵֽׂה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Arise, it is thy part to give orders, and we will be with thee: take courage, and do it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin nouse, sillä sinun se tulee, me olemme sinun kanssas; ole hyvässä turvassa ja tee niin.
verses.king_james: Arise; for this matter belongeth unto thee: we also will be with thee: be of good courage, and do it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surrexit ergo Esdras, et adjuravit principes sacerdotum et Levitarum, et omnem Israël, ut facerent secundum verbum hoc : et juraverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣קׇם עֶזְרָ֡א וַיַּשְׁבַּ֣ע אֶת־שָׂרֵי֩ הַכֹּהֲנִ֨ים הַלְוִיִּ֜ם וְכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל לַעֲשׂ֛וֹת כַּדָּבָ֥ר הַזֶּ֖ה וַיִּשָּׁבֵֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Esdras arose, and made the chiefs of the priests and of the Levites, and all Israel, to swear that they would do according to this word, and they swore.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin nousi Esra ja vannotti ylimmäiset papit ja Leviläiset, ja koko Israelin, tekemään tämän sanan jälkeen; ja he vannoivat.
verses.king_james: Then arose Ezra, and made the chief priests, the Levites, and all Israel, to swear that they should do according to this word. And they sware.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et surrexit Esdras ante domum Dei, et abiit ad cubiculum Johanan filii Eliasib, et ingressus est illuc : panem non comedit, et aquam non bibit : lugebat enim transgressionem eorum, qui venerant de captivitate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣קׇם עֶזְרָ֗א מִלִּפְנֵי֙ בֵּ֣ית הָֽאֱלֹהִ֔ים וַיֵּ֕לֶךְ אֶל־לִשְׁכַּ֖ת יְהוֹחָנָ֣ן בֶּן־אֶלְיָשִׁ֑יב וַיֵּ֣לֶךְ שָׁ֗ם לֶ֤חֶם לֹֽא־אָכַל֙ וּמַ֣יִם לֹֽא־שָׁתָ֔ה כִּ֥י מִתְאַבֵּ֖ל עַל־מַ֥עַל הַגּוֹלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Esdras rose up from before the house of God, and went to the chamber of Johanan the son of Eliasib, and entered in thither: he ate no bread, and drank no water: for he mourned for the transgression of them that were come out of the captivity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Esra nousi Jumalan huoneen edestä ja meni Johananin Eliasibin pojan kammioon; ja kuin hän sinne tuli, ei hän syönyt leipää eikä juonut vettä; sillä hän murehti heidän rikostensa tähden, jotka olivat olleet vankeudessa.
verses.king_james: Then Ezra rose up from before the house of God, and went into the chamber of Johanan the son of Eliashib: and when he came thither, he did eat no bread, nor drink water: for he mourned because of the transgression of them that had been carried away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et missa est vox in Juda et in Jerusalem omnibus filiis transmigrationis, ut congregarentur in Jerusalem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲבִ֨ירוּ ק֜וֹל בִּיהוּדָ֣ה וִירֽוּשָׁלַ֗͏ִם לְכֹל֙ בְּנֵ֣י הַגּוֹלָ֔ה לְהִקָּבֵ֖ץ יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And proclamation was made in Juda and Jerusalem to all the children of the captivity, that they should assemble together into Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he kuuluttivat Juudassa ja Jerusalemissa kaikille lapsille, jotka vankina olivat olleet, tulemaan kokoon Jerusalemiin.
verses.king_james: And they made proclamation throughout Judah and Jerusalem unto all the children of the captivity, that they should gather themselves together unto Jerusalem;

verses.latin_vulgate: et omnis qui non venerit in tribus diebus juxta consilium principum et seniorum, auferetur universa substantia ejus, et ipse abjicietur de cœtu transmigrationis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכֹל֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר לֹֽא־יָב֜וֹא לִשְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת הַיָּמִ֗ים כַּעֲצַ֤ת הַשָּׂרִים֙ וְהַזְּקֵנִ֔ים יׇחֳרַ֖ם כׇּל־רְכוּשׁ֑וֹ וְה֥וּא יִבָּדֵ֖ל מִקְּהַ֥ל הַגּוֹלָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And that whosoever would not come within three days, according to the counsel of the princes and the ancients, all his substance should be taken away, and he should be cast out of the company of them that were returned from captivity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja joka ei kolmena päivänä tullut päämiesten ja vanhimpain neuvon jälkeen, niin kaikki hänen tavaransa piti kirottu oleman, ja hän itse piti eroitettaman niiden joukosta, jotka vankina olivat olleet.
verses.king_james: And that whosoever would not come within three days, according to the counsel of the princes and the elders, all his substance should be forfeited, and himself separated from the congregation of those that had been carried away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Convenerunt igitur omnes viri Juda et Benjamin in Jerusalem tribus diebus : ipse est mensis nonus, vigesimo die mensis : et sedit omnis populus in platea domus Dei, trementes pro peccato, et pluviis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקָּבְצ֣וּ כׇל־אַנְשֵֽׁי־יְהוּדָה֩ וּבִנְיָמִ֨ן ׀ יְרוּשָׁלַ֜͏ִם לִשְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת הַיָּמִ֗ים ה֛וּא חֹ֥דֶשׁ הַתְּשִׁיעִ֖י בְּעֶשְׂרִ֣ים בַּחֹ֑דֶשׁ וַיֵּשְׁב֣וּ כׇל־הָעָ֗ם בִּרְחוֹב֙ בֵּ֣ית הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים מַרְעִידִ֥ים עַל־הַדָּבָ֖ר וּמֵהַגְּשָׁמִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Then all the men of Juda, and Benjamin gathered themselves together to Jerusalem within three days, in the ninth month, the twentieth day of the month: and all the people sat in the street of the house of God, trembling because of the sin, and the rain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tulivat kaikki Juudan ja Benjaminin miehet Jerusalemiin kolmessa päivässä kokoon, se on, kahdentenakymmenentenä päivänä yhdeksännessä kuussa; ja kaikki kansa istui kadulla Herran huoneen edessä, ja värisivät siitä asiasta ja sateen tähden.
verses.king_james: Then all the men of Judah and Benjamin gathered themselves together unto Jerusalem within three days. It was the ninth month, on the twentieth day of the month; and all the people sat in the street of the house of God, trembling because of this matter, and for the great rain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et surrexit Esdras sacerdos, et dixit ad eos : Vos transgressi estis, et duxistis uxores alienigenas, ut adderetis super delictum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨קׇם עֶזְרָ֤א הַכֹּהֵן֙ וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֲלֵהֶ֔ם אַתֶּ֣ם מְעַלְתֶּ֔ם וַתֹּשִׁ֖יבוּ נָשִׁ֣ים נׇכְרִיּ֑וֹת לְהוֹסִ֖יף עַל־אַשְׁמַ֥ת יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Esdras the priest stood up, and said to them: You have transgressed, and taken strange wives, to add to the sins of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pappi Esra nousi ja sanoi heille: te olette rikkoneet, naidessanne muukalaisia vaimoja, ja lisänneet Israelin synnit.
verses.king_james: And Ezra the priest stood up, and said unto them, Ye have transgressed, and have taken strange wives, to increase the trespass of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc date confessionem Domino Deo patrum vestrorum, et facite placitum ejus, et separamini a populis terræ, et ab uxoribus alienigenis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה תְּנ֥וּ תוֹדָ֛ה לַיהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵֽי־אֲבֹתֵיכֶ֖ם וַעֲשׂ֣וּ רְצוֹנ֑וֹ וְהִבָּֽדְלוּ֙ מֵעַמֵּ֣י הָאָ֔רֶץ וּמִן־הַנָּשִׁ֖ים הַנׇּכְרִיּֽוֹת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And now make confession to the Lord the God of your fathers, and do his pleasure, and separate yourselves from the people of the land, and from your strange wives.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tunnustakaat nyt se Herralle isäinne Jumalalle, ja tehkäät sitä, kuin hänelle kelpaa, ja eroittakaat teitänne maan kansoista ja muukalaisista vaimoista.
verses.king_james: Now therefore make confession unto the Lord God of your fathers, and do his pleasure: and separate yourselves from the people of the land, and from the strange wives.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et respondit universa multitudo, dixitque voce magna : Juxta verbum tuum ad nos, sic fiat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּֽעֲנ֧וּ כׇֽל־הַקָּהָ֛ל וַיֹּאמְר֖וּ ק֣וֹל גָּד֑וֹל כֵּ֛ן (כדבריך) [כִּדְבָרְךָ֥] עָלֵ֖ינוּ לַעֲשֽׂוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the multitude answered and said with a loud voice: According to thy word unto us, so be it done.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin vastasi koko seurakunta ja sanoi korkialla äänellä: se pitää niin tapahtuman, kuin sinä meille olet sanonut.
verses.king_james: Then all the congregation answered and said with a loud voice, As thou hast said, so must we do.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen quia populus multus est, et tempus pluviæ, et non sustinemus stare foris, et opus non est diei unius vel duorum (vehementer quippe peccavimus in sermone isto),
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲבָ֞ל הָעָ֥ם רָב֙ וְהָעֵ֣ת גְּשָׁמִ֔ים וְאֵ֥ין כֹּ֖חַ לַעֲמ֣וֹד בַּח֑וּץ וְהַמְּלָאכָ֗ה לֹֽא־לְי֤וֹם אֶחָד֙ וְלֹ֣א לִשְׁנַ֔יִם כִּֽי־הִרְבִּ֥ינוּ לִפְשֹׁ֖עַ בַּדָּבָ֥ר הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But as the people are many, and it is time of rain, and we are not able to stand without, and it is not a work of one day or two, (for we have exceedingly sinned in this matter,)
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kansaa on paljo, ja on sadeilma, ja ei voi ulkona seisoa, eikä tämä ole yhden eli kahden päivän työ; sillä meitä on paljo, jotka olemme siinä asiassa sangen suuresti syntiä tehneet.
verses.king_james: But the people are many, and it is a time of much rain, and we are not able to stand without, neither is this a work of one day or two: for we are many that have transgressed in this thing.

verses.latin_vulgate: constituantur principes in universa multitudine : et omnes in civitatibus nostris qui duxerunt uxores alienigenas veniant in temporibus statutis, et cum his seniores per civitatem et civitatem, et judices ejus, donec avertatur ira Dei nostri a nobis super peccato hoc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַֽעַמְדוּ־נָ֣א שָׂ֠רֵ֠ינוּ לְֽכׇל־הַקָּהָ֞ל וְכֹ֣ל ׀ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בֶּעָרֵ֗ינוּ הַהֹשִׁ֞יב נָשִׁ֤ים נׇכְרִיּוֹת֙ יָבֹא֙ לְעִתִּ֣ים מְזֻמָּנִ֔ים וְעִמָּהֶ֛ם זִקְנֵי־עִ֥יר וָעִ֖יר וְשֹׁפְטֶ֑יהָ עַ֠ד לְהָשִׁ֞יב חֲר֤וֹן אַף־אֱלֹהֵ֙ינוּ֙ מִמֶּ֔נּוּ עַ֖ד לַדָּבָ֥ר הַזֶּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Let rulers be appointed in all the multitude: and in all our cities, let them that have taken strange wives come at the times appointed, and with them the ancients and the judges of every city, until the wrath of our God be turned away from us for this sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Anna meidän päämiestemme koko seurakunnassa toimittaa, että kaikki, jotka meidän kaupungeissamme ovat naineet muukalaisia vaimoja, tulevat tänne määrättynä päivänä, jokaisen kaupungin vanhimpain ja tuomarein kanssa, siihenasti kuin meidän Jumalamme viha kääntyy meistä tämän syyn tähden.
verses.king_james: Let now our rulers of all the congregation stand, and let all them which have taken strange wives in our cities come at appointed times, and with them the elders of every city, and the judges thereof, until the fierce wrath of our God for this matter be turned from us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur Jonathan filius Azahel, et Jaasia filius Thecue, steterunt super hoc, et Messollam et Sebethai Levites adjuverunt eos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֣ךְ יוֹנָתָ֧ן בֶּן־עֲשָׂהאֵ֛ל וְיַחְזְיָ֥ה בֶן־תִּקְוָ֖ה עָמְד֣וּ עַל־זֹ֑את וּמְשֻׁלָּ֛ם וְשַׁבְּתַ֥י הַלֵּוִ֖י עֲזָרֻֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Jonathan the son of Azahel, and Jaasia the son of Thecua were appointed over this, and Mesollam and Sebethai, Levites, helped them:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin astuivat ainoastaan Jonatan Asahelin poika ja Jahasia Tikvan poika tähän toimitukseen; ja Metullam ja Sabtai, Leviläiset, auttivat heitä.
verses.king_james: Only Jonathan the son of Asahel and Jahaziah the son of Tikvah were employed about this matter: and Meshullam and Shabbethai the Levite helped them.

verses.latin_vulgate: feceruntque sic filii transmigrationis. Et abierunt Esdras sacerdos, et viri principes familiarum, in domos patrum suorum, et omnes per nomina sua, et sederunt in die primo mensis decimi ut quærerent rem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּֽעֲשׂוּ־כֵן֮ בְּנֵ֣י הַגּוֹלָה֒ וַיִּבָּדְלוּ֩ עֶזְרָ֨א הַכֹּהֵ֜ן אֲנָשִׁ֨ים רָאשֵׁ֧י הָאָב֛וֹת לְבֵ֥ית אֲבֹתָ֖ם וְכֻלָּ֣ם בְּשֵׁמ֑וֹת וַיֵּשְׁב֗וּ בְּי֤וֹם אֶחָד֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הָעֲשִׂירִ֔י לְדַרְי֖וֹשׁ הַדָּבָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of the captivity did so. And Esdras the priest, and the men heads of the families in the houses of their fathers, and all by their names, went and sat down in the first day of the tenth month to examine the matter.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vankeuden lapset tekivät niin; ja eroitettiin Esra pappi ja päämiehet heidän isäinsä sukukuntain seassa, ja kaikki, kuin nimitetyt ovat, ja he istuivat ensimäisenä päivänä kymmenennessä kuukaudessa tutkistelemaan sitä.
verses.king_james: And the children of the captivity did so. And Ezra the priest, with certain chief of the fathers, after the house of their fathers, and all of them by their names, were separated, and sat down in the first day of the tenth month to examine the matter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et consummati sunt omnes viri, qui duxerant uxores alienigenas, usque ad diem primam mensis primi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְכַלּ֣וּ בַכֹּ֔ל אֲנָשִׁ֕ים הַהֹשִׁ֖יבוּ נָשִׁ֣ים נׇכְרִיּ֑וֹת עַ֛ד י֥וֹם אֶחָ֖ד לַחֹ֥דֶשׁ הָרִאשֽׁוֹן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they made an end with all the men that had taken strange wives by the first day of the first month.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he toimittivat sen kaikkein miesten kanssa, joilla olivat muukalaiset vaimot, ensimäiseen päivään asti ensimäisessä kuussa.
verses.king_james: And they made an end with all the men that had taken strange wives by the first day of the first month.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et inventi sunt de filiis sacerdotum qui duxerant uxores alienigenas. De filiis Josue filii Josedec, et fratres ejus, Maasia, et Eliezer, et Jarib, et Godolia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּמָּצֵא֙ מִבְּנֵ֣י הַכֹּהֲנִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֹשִׁ֖יבוּ נָשִׁ֣ים נׇכְרִיּ֑וֹת מִבְּנֵ֨י יֵשׁ֤וּעַ בֶּן־יֽוֹצָדָק֙ וְאֶחָ֔יו מַֽעֲשֵׂיָה֙ וֶֽאֱלִיעֶ֔זֶר וְיָרִ֖יב וּגְדַלְיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there were found among the sons of the priests that had taken strange wives: Of the sons of Josue the son of Josedec, and his brethren, Maasia, and Eliezer, and Jarib, and Godolia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pappein poikain seasta löydettiin, jotka olivat ottaneet muukalaisia vaimoja: Jesuan Jotsadakin pojan lasten seassa, ja hänen veljeinsä Maeseja, Elieser, Jarib ja Gedalia.
verses.king_james: And among the sons of the priests there were found that had taken strange wives: namely, of the sons of Jeshua the son of Jozadak, and his brethren; Maaseiah, and Eliezer, and Jarib, and Gedaliah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dederunt manus suas ut ejicerent uxores suas, et pro delicto suo arietem de ovibus offerrent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְּנ֥וּ יָדָ֖ם לְהוֹצִ֣יא נְשֵׁיהֶ֑ם וַאֲשֵׁמִ֥ים אֵֽיל־צֹ֖אן עַל־אַשְׁמָתָֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And they gave their hands to put away their wives, and to offer for their offence a ram of the flock.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he antoivat kätensä, ajamaan vaimonsa ulos ja antamaan jäärän rikosuhriksensa rikoksensa edestä;
verses.king_james: And they gave their hands that they would put away their wives; and being guilty, they offered a ram of the flock for their trespass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Emmer, Hanani, et Zebedia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֣י אִמֵּ֔ר חֲנָ֖נִי וּזְבַדְיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Emmer, Hanani, and Zebedia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Immerin lasten seassa: Hanani ja Sebadia;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Immer; Hanani, and Zebadiah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Harim, Maasia, et Elia, et Semeia, et Jehiel, et Ozias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֖י חָרִ֑ם מַעֲשֵׂיָ֤ה וְאֵֽלִיָּה֙ וּֽשְׁמַֽעְיָ֔ה וִיחִיאֵ֖ל וְעֻזִּיָּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Harim, Maasia, and Elia, and Semeia, and Jehiel, and Ozias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Harimin lasten seassa: Maeseja, Elia, Semaja, Jehiel ja Ussia;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Harim; Maaseiah, and Elijah, and Shemaiah, and Jehiel, and Uzziah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Pheshur, Elioënai, Maasia, Ismaël, Nathanaël, Jozabed, et Elasa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֖י פַּשְׁח֑וּר אֶלְיוֹעֵינַ֤י מַֽעֲשֵׂיָה֙ יִשְׁמָעֵ֣אל נְתַנְאֵ֔ל יוֹזָבָ֖ד וְאֶלְעָשָֽׂה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Pheshur, Elioenai, Maasia, Ismael, Nathanael, Jozabed, and Elasa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pashurin lasten seassa: Eljoenai, Maaseja, Ismael, Netaneel, Josabad ja Eleasa;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Pashur; Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad, and Elasah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Levitarum, Jozabed, et Semei, et Celaia, ipse est Calita, Phataia, Juda, et Eliezer.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִֽן־הַלְוִיִּ֑ם יוֹזָבָ֣ד וְשִׁמְעִ֗י וְקֵֽלָיָה֙ ה֣וּא קְלִיטָ֔א פְּתַֽחְיָ֥ה יְהוּדָ֖ה וֶאֱלִיעֶֽזֶר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of the Levites, Jozabed, and Semei, and Celaia, the same is Calita, Phataia, Juda, and Eliezer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Leviläisistä: Josabad, Simei ja Kelaja, se on Kelita, Petakia, Juuda ja Elieser;
verses.king_james: Also of the Levites; Jozabad, and Shimei, and Kelaiah, (the same is Kelita,) Pethahiah, Judah, and Eliezer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de cantoribus, Eliasib. Et de janitoribus, Sellum, et Telem, et Uri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִן־הַמְשֹׁרְרִ֖ים אֶלְיָשִׁ֑יב וּמִן־הַשֹּׁ֣עֲרִ֔ים שַׁלֻּ֥ם וָטֶ֖לֶם וְאוּרִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the singing men, Elisiab: and of the porters, Sellum, and Telem, and Uri.
verses.finnish_biblia: Veisaajain seassa: Eljasib; ovenvartijain seassa: Sallum, Telem ja Uri.
verses.king_james: Of the singers also; Eliashib: and of the porters; Shallum, and Telem, and Uri.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ex Israël, de filiis Pharos, Remeia, et Jesia, et Melchia, et Miamin, et Eliezer, et Melchia, et Banea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִֽיִּשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מִבְּנֵ֣י פַרְעֹ֡שׁ רַ֠מְיָ֠ה וְיִזִּיָּ֤ה וּמַלְכִּיָּה֙ וּמִיָּמִ֣ן וְאֶלְעָזָ֔ר וּמַלְכִּיָּ֖ה וּבְנָיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of Israel, of the sons of Pharos, Remeia, and Jezia, and Melchia, and Miamin, and Eliezer, and Melchia, and Banea.
verses.finnish_biblia: Israelista Paroksen lasten seassa: Ramia, Jesia, Malkia, Mejamin, Eleasar, Malkia ja Benaja;
verses.king_james: Moreover of Israel: of the sons of Parosh; Ramiah, and Jeziah, and Malchiah, and Miamin, and Eleazar, and Malchijah, and Benaiah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Ælam, Mathania, Zacharias, et Jehiel, et Abdi, et Jerimoth, et Elia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֖י עֵילָ֑ם מַתַּנְיָ֤ה זְכַרְיָה֙ וִיחִיאֵ֣ל וְעַבְדִּ֔י וִירֵמ֖וֹת וְאֵלִיָּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Elam, Mathania, Zacharias, and Jehiel, and Abdi, and Jerimoth, and Elia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Elamin lasten seassa: Mattania, Sakaria, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremot ja Elia;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Elam; Mattaniah, Zechariah, and Jehiel, and Abdi, and Jeremoth, and Eliah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Zethua, Elioënai, Eliasib, Mathania, et Jerimuth, et Zabad, et Aziza.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֖י זַתּ֑וּא אֶלְיוֹעֵנַ֤י אֶלְיָשִׁיב֙ מַתַּנְיָ֣ה וִֽירֵמ֔וֹת וְזָבָ֖ד וַעֲזִיזָֽא׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Zethua, Elioenai, Eliasib, Mathania, Jerimuth, and Zabad, and Aziaza.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sattun lasten seassa: Eljoenai, Eljasib, Mattania, Jeremot, Sabad ja Asisa;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Zattu; Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, and Jeremoth, and Zabad, and Aziza.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Bebai, Johanan, Hanania, Zabbai, Athalai.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֖י בֵּבָ֑י יְהוֹחָנָ֥ן חֲנַנְיָ֖ה זַבַּ֥י עַתְלָֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Babai, Johanan, Hanania, Zabbai, Athalai:
verses.finnish_biblia: Bebain lasten seassa: Johanan, Hanania, Sebai ja Atlai;
verses.king_james: Of the sons also of Bebai; Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, and Athlai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Bani, Mosollam, et Melluch, et Adaia, Jasub, et Saal, et Ramoth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֖י בָּנִ֑י מְשֻׁלָּ֤ם מַלּוּךְ֙ וַעֲדָיָ֔ה יָשׁ֖וּב וּשְׁאָ֥ל (ירמות) [וְרָמֽוֹת]׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Bani, Mosollam, and Melluch, and Adaia, Jasub, and Saal, and Ramoth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Banin lasten seassa: Mesullam, Malluk, Adaja, Jasub, Seal ja Jeramoth;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Bani; Meshullam, Malluch, and Adaiah, Jashub, and Sheal, and Ramoth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Phahath Moab, Edna, et Chalal, Banaias, et Maasias, Mathanias, Beseleel, Bennui, et Manasse.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֛י פַּחַ֥ת מוֹאָ֖ב עַדְנָ֣א וּכְלָ֑ל בְּנָיָ֤ה מַעֲשֵׂיָה֙ מַתַּנְיָ֣ה בְצַלְאֵ֔ל וּבִנּ֖וּי וּמְנַשֶּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Phahath, Moab, Edna, and Chalal, Banaias, and Maasias, Mathanias, Beseleel, Bennui, and Manasse.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pahatmoabin lasten seassa: Adna ja Kelal, Benaja, Maeseja, Mattania, Betsaleel, Binnui ja Manasse;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Pahath–moab; Adna, and Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezaleel, and Binnui, and Manasseh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Herem, Eliezer, Josue, Melchias, Semeias, Simeon,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י חָרִ֑ם אֱלִיעֶ֧זֶר יִשִּׁיָּ֛ה מַלְכִּיָּ֖ה שְׁמַֽעְיָ֥ה שִׁמְעֽוֹן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Herem, Eliezer, Josue, Melchias, Semeias, Simeon,
verses.finnish_biblia: Harimin lasten seassa: Elieser, Jesia, Malkia, Semaja, Simeon,
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Harim; Eliezer, Ishijah, Malchiah, Shemaiah, Shimeon,

verses.latin_vulgate: Benjamin, Maloch, Samarias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּנְיָמִ֥ן מַלּ֖וּךְ שְׁמַרְיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Benjamin, Maloch, Samarias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Benjamin, Malluk ja Semaria;
verses.king_james: Benjamin, Malluch, and Shemariah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis Hasom, Mathanai, Mathatha, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jermai, Manasse, Semei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִבְּנֵ֖י חָשֻׁ֑ם מַתְּנַ֤י מַתַּתָּה֙ זָבָ֣ד אֱלִיפֶ֔לֶט יְרֵמַ֥י מְנַשֶּׁ֖ה שִׁמְעִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of Hasom, Mathanai, Mathatha, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jermai, Manasse, Semei.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hasumin lasten seassa: Mattenai, Mattatta, Sabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasse ja Simei;
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Hashum; Mattenai, Mattathah, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh, and Shimei.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Bani, Maadi, Amram, et Vel,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִבְּנֵ֣י בָנִ֔י מַעֲדַ֥י עַמְרָ֖ם וְאוּאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Bani, Maaddi, Amram, and Uel,
verses.finnish_biblia: Banin lasten seassa: Maadai, Amram, Uel,
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Bani; Maadai, Amram, and Uel,

verses.latin_vulgate: Baneas, et Badaias, Cheliau,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנָיָ֥ה בֵדְיָ֖ה (כלוהי) [כְּלֽוּהוּ]׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Baneas, and Badaias, Cheliau,
verses.finnish_biblia: Benaja, Bedeja, Keluhi,
verses.king_james: Benaiah, Bedeiah, Chelluh,

verses.latin_vulgate: Vania, Marimuth, et Eliasib,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַנְיָ֥ה מְרֵמ֖וֹת אֶלְיָשִֽׁיב׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Vania, Marimuth, and Eliasib,
verses.finnish_biblia: Vania, Meremot, Eljasib
verses.king_james: Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib,

verses.latin_vulgate: Mathanias, Mathanai, et Jasi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַתַּנְיָ֥ה מַתְּנַ֖י (ויעשו) [וְיַעֲשָֽׂי]׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Mathanias, Mathania, and Jasi,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mattania, Mattenai, Jaasav,
verses.king_james: Mattaniah, Mattenai, and Jaasau,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Bani, et Bennui, Semei,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָנִ֥י וּבִנּ֖וּי שִׁמְעִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Bani, and Bennui, Semei,
verses.finnish_biblia: Bani, Binnui, Simei,
verses.king_james: And Bani, and Binnui, Shimei,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Salmias, et Nathan, et Adaias,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשֶֽׁלֶמְיָ֥ה וְנָתָ֖ן וַעֲדָיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Salmias, and Nathan, and Adaias,
verses.finnish_biblia: Selemia, Natan, Adaja,
verses.king_james: And Shelemiah, and Nathan, and Adaiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Mechnedebai, Sisai, Sarai,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַכְנַדְבַ֥י שָׁשַׁ֖י שָׁרָֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Mechnedebai, Sisai, Sarai,
verses.finnish_biblia: Maknadbai, Sasai, Sarai,
verses.king_james: Machnadebai, Shashai, Sharai,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ezrel, et Selemiau, Semeria,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲזַרְאֵ֥ל וְשֶׁלֶמְיָ֖הוּ שְׁמַרְיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Ezrel, and Selemiau, Semeria,
verses.finnish_biblia: Asareel, Selemia, Semaria,
verses.king_james: Azareel, and Shelemiah, Shemariah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sellum, Amaria, Joseph.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׁלּ֥וּם אֲמַרְיָ֖ה יוֹסֵֽף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Sellum, Amaria, Joseph.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sallum, Amaria ja Joseph;
verses.king_james: Shallum, Amariah, and Joseph.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Nebo, Jehiel, Mathathias, Zabad, Zabina, Jeddu, et Joël, et Banaia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִבְּנֵ֖י נְב֑וֹ יְעִיאֵ֤ל מַתִּתְיָה֙ זָבָ֣ד זְבִינָ֔א (ידו) [יַדַּ֥י] וְיוֹאֵ֖ל בְּנָיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Nebo, Jehiel, Mathathias, Zabad, Zabina, Jeddu, and Joel, and Banaia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nebon lasten seassa: Jejel, Mattitia, Sabad, Sebina, Jaddai, Joel ja Benaja.
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Nebo; Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jadau, and Joel, Benaiah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes hi acceperant uxores alienigenas, et fuerunt ex eis mulieres, quæ pepererant filios.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־אֵ֕לֶּה (נשאי) [נָשְׂא֖וּ] נָשִׁ֣ים נׇכְרִיּ֑וֹת וְיֵ֣שׁ מֵהֶ֣ם נָשִׁ֔ים וַיָּשִׂ֖ימוּ בָּנִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: All these had taken strange wives, and there were among them women that had borne children.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät kaikki olivat ottaneet muukalaisia vaimoja, ja olivat monikahdat niistä vaimoista, joiden kanssa he olivat siittäneet lapsia.
verses.king_james: All these had taken strange wives: and some of them had wives by whom they had children.
